status.title: AI AUTONOMY STATUS
status.level.available.description: AI drafting is ready to use
status.level.perCategory.description: Different trust levels per email type
status.whatsNext.observe: Analyzing your writing style. Send more emails to build your profile.
status.whatsNext.available: Try generating a draft reply on your next email.
status.whatsNext.draft: Keep using drafts. After 250+ emails and high confidence, auto-draft unlocks.
status.whatsNext.autoDraft: When 95% of drafts are sent unchanged, auto-send becomes available.
status.whatsNext.autoSend: Configure per-category autonomy to fine-tune which emails get auto-sent.
autoDraft.title: AUTO-DRAFT
autoDraft.description: Pre-generate draft replies for inbound emails on linked threads
autoDraft.banner.description: Based on your writing style. Review before sending.
category.title: PER-CATEGORY AUTONOMY
category.description: Set different trust levels for each email type
category.warning.autoSend: Emails in this category will be sent automatically after a delay. You can always cancel pending sends from your inbox.
milestone.draftAvailable.title: AI EMAIL DRAFTING READY
milestone.draftAvailable.body: Your writing profile is strong enough to generate draft replies. Try it on your next email.
milestone.autoDraftReady.title: AUTO-DRAFT AVAILABLE
milestone.autoDraftReady.body: Draft replies can be generated automatically before you open emails.
milestone.autoSendSuggested.title: AUTO-SEND RECOMMENDED
milestone.autoSendSuggested.body: {{rate}}% of your drafts are sent without changes. Auto-send can handle routine replies.
